mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%'
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form WHERE site = #{site} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form WHERE site = #{site}
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form WHERE approval = #{approval} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form WHERE approval = #{approval}
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form WHERE author_mail = #{authorMail} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form WHERE author_mail = #{authorMail} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment_info_form WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_risk_assessment_info_form (risk_id, title, complete_date, category_num, regular_or_occasional, site, author_name, author_mail, author_dept, author_company, approval, approval_mail, comment, occ_manager_mail, status, allow_resubmit, reject_reason, risk_cnt, cnt_off, cnt_vis, cnt_cow, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{riskId}, #{title}, #{completeDate}, #{categoryNum}, #{regularOrOccasional}, #{site}, #{authorName}, #{authorMail}, #{authorDept}, #{authorCompany}, #{approval}, #{approvalMail}, #{comment}, #{occManagerMail}, #{status}, #{allowResubmit}, #{rejectReason}, #{riskCnt}, #{cntOff}, #{cntVis}, #{cntCow}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_risk_assessment_info_form SET title = #{title}, complete_date = #{completeDate}, category_num = #{categoryNum}, regular_or_occasional = #{regularOrOccasional}, site = #{site}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_mail = #{authorMail}, author_dept = #{authorDept}, author_company = #{authorCompany}, approval = #{approval}, approval_mail = #{approvalMail}, comment = #{comment}, occ_manager_mail = #{occManagerMail}, status = #{status}, allow_resubmit = #{allowResubmit}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, risk_cnt = #{riskCnt}, cnt_off = #{cntOff}, cnt_vis = #{cntVis}, cnt_cow = #{cntCow}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_risk_assessment_info_form SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
